results.test: End-to-end test: fetch from sources → transform → classify → send email.
results.stdout:
[1] Fetching from real sources...
   GDACS: 12 incidents
   ProMED: 5 incidents

[2] Transforming to schema...
   Transformed: 3 incidents

[3] Classifying...
   Classified: 3 incidents

[4] Sending email...
   From: contato.eric.lopes@gmail.com
   To: contato.eric.lopes@gmail.com

[5] Verifying...
   SUCCESS! Sent report with 3 incidents
results.docstring: End-to-end test: fetch from sources → transform → classify → send email.

SKIP: GOOGLE_SHEETS_URL not set in environment
To run this test:

2. Set GOOGLE_SHEETS_URL with edit-enabled link
3. Set up Google credentials (OAuth2 or service account)

Then: Should run complete pipeline

1. Fetching from gdacs...
   Found 12 raw incidents
2. Transforming to schema...

3. Classifying...
   Classified 12 incidents
4. Storing...
   Stored in incidents

=== Pipeline Complete ===
